vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the four pots. The environment is currently a 'dead' system.
anomalies: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like debris in the foreground pot.
Total absence of expected flora across all registered pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots, while physically present, contain only soil and inert debris. The white rabbit anchor in P3 serves as a stark reminder of the intended biome, which is currently non-functional. The transition from the earliest image to the current state shows no growth, only the continued absence of life.
